notes: v0.16.79 — Mini-boss empty-arena hotfix + stat-label cleanup. HOTFIX: rift MINI-BOSS encounters were spawning a visually-broken arena because the BOSS_RUSH per-frame loop called Circle Boss methods (`touch_radius`, `TOUCH_DAMAGE_BASE`) directly against the MiniBoss script, which silently aborted physics every frame. Same hole on `_on_snare` → `add_laser_telegraph`. Both now method-probe before calling. HIVE MOTHER drones never spawned — `kind` is set after `_ready`, so the queen-only build path got skipped. Now built lazily on first physics tick. MODULES: removed cosmetic-only `cosm_trail` / `cosm_shield` metadata keys (purely decorative, no gameplay effect). MODULE STATS PANEL: every stat now has a human-readable label — ~30 keys (kill_invuln, dmg_reduction, dash_charges_bonus, hp_per_kill_streak, etc.) were leaking as raw snake_case. Seconds-suffixed where appropriate, percentages where appropriate. Windows only.
